pair.ip_hint: Leave empty to scan the network automatically.
pair.login_subtitle: Scan your local network to find Hoymiles DTUs automatically.
pair.serial_hint: Detected automatically from the DTU. Only fill in as fallback.
pair.login_ready: Tap "Scan Network" to search for Hoymiles DTUs on your local network.
pair.review_lead: We found your Hoymiles DTUs automatically. Review the detected information below and continue when it looks correct.
pair.review_note: Advanced options are available per device, but most users do not need to change anything here. Use manual correction only if the detected setup looks wrong.
pair.manual_help: Only change these values if the automatic detection is incorrect.
pair.panel_count_hint: Number of PV strings connected to this inverter.
pair.enc_rand_hint: Usually filled automatically. Only needed for encrypted DTUs.
pair.panel_count_error: Panel count must be between 1 and 8 for every device.

error.no_dtu_found: No Hoymiles DTU found on network. Enter the IP address manually.
error.cannot_reach: Cannot reach DTU at __ip__. Check IP and network.
error.no_dtu_responded: No Hoymiles DTU responded. Check IP and network.
error.no_devices: No devices found — please go back and try again.
